sql.i: select rowguid,parentguid,viewname,addtime,url,sortnum,parentname,images,isroot,remark from abs_viewinfo where $like(viewname,viewname) and $equal(isroot,isroot) and $equal(parentguid,parentguid) order by sortnum desc
select count(1) from abs_viewinfo where $like(viewname,viewname) and $equal(isroot,isroot) and $equal(parentguid,parentguid)
select count(1) from abs_viewinfo where viewname={viewname} and $unequal(rowguid,rowguid)
select * from abs_viewinfo where isroot={isroot} order by sortnum desc
select rowguid,parentguid,viewname,url,sortnum,parentname,images,isroot from abs_viewinfo where parentguid={parentguid} order by sortnum desc
select rowguid,viewname,sortnum,images,url,remark from abs_viewinfo where isroot={isroot} order by sortnum desc
select rowguid,viewname,sortnum,images,url,remark from abs_viewinfo where parentguid={parentguid} order by sortnum desc
